{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=Supposedly, Snail Shell is a favorite of Jack the Ripper, who would wear it when out looking for victims and even until when he was sent to the gallows.
|affct=ART
|hard=ATK
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=9910
|relic1=Gloomy Sunday
|relic2=Murder On The Train
|relic3=Murders in Rue Morgue
|relic4=Crime and Punishment
|relic5=Boy with Apple
}}
|color=green
|earth=2
|water=1
|fire=2
|wind=1
|form=Demon
|element=Wind
|realm=Rift
|orangehard=RUSH
}}
